name: Sarah Chen
bio: Book club buddy who always has the best recommendations and a stronger opinion about the ending than you do.

name: David Kim
bio: Cousin who never misses a family gathering and always brings the good snacks.

name: Emma Wilson
bio: Travel partner for every spontaneous weekend trip and the only person who packs lighter than you.

name: James Wright
bio: Former colleague, great mentor — still the first call whenever a career decision feels too big to make alone.

name: Lisa Nakamura
bio: Pottery class friend with an incredible sense of humor and zero patience for wobbly bowls.

name: Aisha Patel
bio: Sister-in-law who's basically a sister — keeper of every family recipe worth keeping.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: College roommate turned lifelong best friend, currently three time zones away.

name: Olivia Martinez
bio: Running club partner who keeps you accountable for the 6am Saturday loop, rain or shine.

name: Ryan O'Brien
bio: Neighbor and weekend barbecue regular — owns the only grill thermometer that actually works.

name: Tom Baker
bio: Old friend from study-abroad days, now scattered across the globe but always up for a long catch-up call.
